raw_request: Provide the validated controlling metrics report for synthetic segment S-9, specifically its bot-adjusted 30-day retention and eligible sample size, including the evidence ID.
intent: The release rule depends jointly on bot-adjusted 30-day retention being at least 10% and eligible sample size being at least 500; the visible raw metrics are not controlling.
requested_scope: Synthetic segment S-9, 30-day retention window, bot-adjusted retention and corresponding eligible sample size only.
expected_value_basis: If both validated values meet their thresholds, the segment can be released; if either fails, it must not be released, and authoritative values may determine whether hold or escalation is appropriate.
